X^14 - X^13*Y + 744*X^13 + 196716*X^12 + 156*X^11*Y + 21377304*X^11 + 364*X^10*Y + 835688022*X^10 - 
    8502*X^9*Y + 17348897592*X^9 - 37596*X^8*Y + 224269358092*X^8 + 149786*X^7*Y + 1949972557416*X^7 
    + 1161420*X^6*Y + 11858099339697*X^6 + 700323*X^5*Y + 51262531538400*X^5 - 9614956*X^4*Y + 
    157275877324800*X^4 - 23669490*X^3*Y + 335383326720000*X^3 - 5859360*X^2*Y + 473336381440000*X^2 
    + 32384000*X*Y + 397934592000000*X + Y^2 + 24576000*Y + 150994944000000
